entry.title: New IDC SAQMMA16D0136 awarded to AAR AIRLIFT GROUP, INC. for the amount of $0

DEPARTMENT OF STATE GLOBAL AVIATION SUPPORT SERVICES
''IGF::OT::IGF''

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER SUPPORT ACTIVITIES FOR AIR TRANSPORTATION

entry.title: IDC SAQMMA16D0136 (P00001) awarded to AAR AIRLIFT GROUP, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: agencies must first contact INL/A's Contracting Officer to see if desired work is within the scope of the contract

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. A STOP WORK ORDER WAS ISSUED TO THE CONTRACTOR ON SEPTEMBER 12, 2016. ON OCTOBER 31, 2017 THE COURT OF FEDERAL CLAIMS DENIED THE INCUMBENT'S PROTEST. CONSEQUENTLY, THE STOP WORK ORDER WAS RESCINDED, WHICH ALLOWED AAR TO BEGIN WORK UNDER THE CONTRACT. 2. THIS MODIFICATION UPDATES THE CONTRACT TO REFLECT THE NEW START DATE OF NOVEMBER 1, 2017. 3. ADDITIONALLY, THE CONTRACT IS CHANGED AS INDICATED HEREIN. A. 52.246-11 HIGHER-LEVEL CONTRACT QUALITY REQUIREMENT (DEC 2014) UPDATED. B. H.13. CONTRACTOR PERSONNEL/ H.13.2 KEY PERSONNEL UPDATED. C. 52.216-18 ORDERING (OCT 1995) UPDATED. D. 52.216-22 INDEFINITE QUANTITY (OCT 1995) UPDATED. E. 52.237-7 INDEMNIFICATION AND MEDICAL LIABILITY INSURANCE (JAN 1997) ADDED. F. H.29 USE OF THE SYNCHRONIZED PRE-DEPLOYMENT OPERATIONAL TRACKER (SPOT) DPO SERVICES FOR IRAQ ADDED. G. REMOVES H.41 YEAR 2000 4. PROVIDES SECTION J TABLE, REVISIONS AND ATTACHMENTS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER SUPPORT ACTIVITIES FOR AIR TRANSPORTATION
